programme.title: The Most Beautiful Day In The World
programme.desc: A theatre entrepreneur has no talent for art or business, but when a distant relative entrusts him with the care of his nephew, the man discovers he has a phenomenal talent that could change the fate of his business.

programme.title: The King Of Laughter
programme.desc: Naples, 1904: Italian theatre is thriving, and comic actor, Eduardo Scarpetta is the box office king. Known in the Neapolitan theater for his cheeky alter egos, Scarpetta’s larger-than-life stage productions were matched only by his eccentric personal life. Composed of wives, partners, lovers, legitimate and illegitimate children (including a young Eduardo De Filippo, famed Neapolitan playwright), Scarpetta’s home situation resembled one of his comedies more than a traditional family. At the height of his popularity, the comedian risked everything by staging a parody of the great Italian poet, Gabriele D’Annunzio. Booed and hissed from the stage by younger rivals, Scarpetta was sued for plagiarism, leading to the first ever copyright lawsuit in Italy. Despite legal troubles and familial strife, Scarpetta fought not only for his craft but for his legacy as one of the great thespians of Italian theater.

programme.title: Official Competition
programme.desc: A billionaire businessman in search of fame and social prestige decides to make a unique, groundbreaking film. To achieve this goal, he hires the best of the best: A stellar team consisting of famous filmmaker Lola Cuevas and two well-known actors who boast not only an enormous talent, but also an even bigger ego: Hollywood star Félix Rivero and aging theater thespian Iván Torres. They're both legends, but not exactly the best of friends.

programme.title: The Amazing Mr. Blunden
programme.desc: Complex, Dickensian ghost story about two young children who move with their mother to an old mansion. The genial resident ghost introduces them to two ghost children, who ask them to solve an ancient mystery. This requires them to travel back in time to save two orphans from a dreadful uncle and a terrible death in a burning house.

programme.title: The Majestic
programme.desc: During the 1950s blacklist era, a young and ambitious Hollywood screenwriter loses his job and sets off on a trip up the California coast without plans to return. Along the way, he gets in an accident, loses his memory and is found on the shore of a small town where it is believed that he is the son of one of the townsfolk who went missing in the war. As the missing soldier's return helps bring the town back to life, the writer finds new courage, love and the power of his convictions.

programme.title: The Straight Story
programme.desc: In his 70s, retired farmer Alvin Straight discovers his brother, Lyle, is critically ill. Stuck without a car or license in Iowa, he decides on a unique odyssey—traveling to Wisconsin on his old lawnmower. His journey is both picturesque and deeply spiritual.

programme.title: Danny Collins
programme.desc: Al Pacino stars as aging 1970s rocker Danny Collins, who can’t give up his hard-living ways. But when his manager (Christopher Plummer) uncovers a 40-year-old undelivered letter written to him by John Lennon, he decides to change course and embarks on a heartfelt journey to rediscover his family, find true love and begin a second act.

programme.title: May December
programme.desc: Decades after their scandalous relationship made headlines, a couple starts to unravel when a famous actor arrives to research them for her new film.

programme.title: A Private Function
programme.desc: In post-war Yorkshire, with rationing still very much in force, a mild-mannered chiropodist tries to prove his worth to the snobbish locals by kidnapping a pig which is being fattened up for a local banquet. Alan Bennett's comedy, starring Michael Palin, Maggie Smith, Denholm Elliott, Alison Steadman and Liz Smith.

programme.title: Brassed Off
programme.desc: The closure of the local coalmine would mean the loss of countless jobs and the end of the village brass band. The bandleader is finding it difficult to motivate his members. But the band stick together and enter a national competition...

programme.title: The Movie Show
programme.desc: The Movie Show was an Australian film review program which was broadcast on SBS TV. Its history is divided into three parts, until it finally wound up in 2008.Reviews and interviews from the movie world.An attraction of the programme were the occasional disagreements of the hosts. Stratton and Pomeranz presented the show for the last time on 12 May 2004 and left SBS because of a perceived \.

programme.title: The Movie Show
programme.desc: In this episode, Margaret Pomeranz talks to Paul Byrnes about the most successful films at the Sydney Film Festival and to Paul Coulter from the WA Film Institute.

programme.title: The Majestic
programme.desc: During the 1950s blacklist era, a young and ambitious Hollywood screenwriter loses his job and sets off on a trip up the California coast without plans to return. Along the way, he gets in an accident, loses his memory and is found on the shore of a small town where it is believed that he is the son of one of the townsfolk who went missing in the war. As the missing soldier's return helps bring the town back to life, the writer finds new courage, love and the power of his convictions.

programme.title: The Straight Story
programme.desc: In his 70s, retired farmer Alvin Straight discovers his brother, Lyle, is critically ill. Stuck without a car or license in Iowa, he decides on a unique odyssey—traveling to Wisconsin on his old lawnmower. His journey is both picturesque and deeply spiritual.

programme.title: Love Thing
programme.desc: A dirty campaign forces movie star Marvin to flee from reporters and fans. Coincidentally, he immerses himself in the cosmos of the feminist/queer off-theatre 3000.

programme.title: Nobody Has To Know
programme.desc: A middle-aged farmhand on a remote Scottish island suffers amnesia following a stroke. A lonely local woman helps him acclimate back to his life.

programme.title: Discovering Film
programme.desc: Ed Harris: A look at the life and career of the Hollywood superstar, whose notable works include acclaimed performances in Apollo 13, The Truman Show and The Hours.

programme.title: Anton Chekhov
programme.desc: Escalating animosity between two men with opposing philosophies of life is played out against the backdrop of a decaying seaside resort along the Black Sea coast.

programme.title: Meek's Cutoff
programme.desc: In this acclaimed Western, travelling settlers find themselves stranded in life-threatening conditions and begin to turn upon each other.

programme.title: The Way Back
programme.desc: Inspired by an incredible true story, THE WAY BACK begins in 1940 when seven prisoners attempt the impossible: escape from a brutal Siberan gulag. Thus begins a treacherous 4,500-mile trek to freedom across the world's most merciless landscapes. Their humanity is further tested when they meet a teenage runway who begs to join them on their quest.

programme.title: Moulin Rouge
programme.desc: A young Englishman in the Paris of 1899, becomes infatuated with Satine, a singer at the Moulin Rouge. However, she has been promised by the manager to a Duke in return for funding his next production. As the young lovers meet in secret, Satine's wedding day draws closer but she hides a fatal secret from both Christian and the Duke.

programme.title: Side Effects
programme.desc: Jon Banks is a young, ambitious psychiatrist who wants to show what he's capable of. Since there are no known medications that can help depressed patient Emily, Joe prescribes a new experimental medication. Emily becomes happy again, full of energy and passionately in love with her husband Martin. But one evening, Martin is stabbed to death. At the crime scene, you find Emily, who doesn't remember anything at all. Is it because of the medication? Can Joe Banks uncover the truth?

programme.title: Danny Collins
programme.desc: Al Pacino stars as aging 1970s rocker Danny Collins, who can’t give up his hard-living ways. But when his manager (Christopher Plummer) uncovers a 40-year-old undelivered letter written to him by John Lennon, he decides to change course and embarks on a heartfelt journey to rediscover his family, find true love and begin a second act.

programme.title: The Movie Show
programme.desc: The Movie Show was an Australian film review program which was broadcast on SBS TV. Its history is divided into three parts, until it finally wound up in 2008.Reviews and interviews from the movie world.An attraction of the programme were the occasional disagreements of the hosts. Stratton and Pomeranz presented the show for the last time on 12 May 2004 and left SBS because of a perceived \.

programme.title: The Movie Show
programme.desc: The Movie Show was an Australian film review program which was broadcast on SBS TV. Its history is divided into three parts, until it finally wound up in 2008.Reviews and interviews from the movie world.An attraction of the programme were the occasional disagreements of the hosts. Stratton and Pomeranz presented the show for the last time on 12 May 2004 and left SBS because of a perceived \.

programme.title: Anton Chekhov
programme.desc: Escalating animosity between two men with opposing philosophies of life is played out against the backdrop of a decaying seaside resort along the Black Sea coast.

programme.title: Discovering Film
programme.desc: Ed Harris: A look at the life and career of the Hollywood superstar, whose notable works include acclaimed performances in Apollo 13, The Truman Show and The Hours.

programme.title: Meek's Cutoff
programme.desc: In this acclaimed Western, travelling settlers find themselves stranded in life-threatening conditions and begin to turn upon each other.

programme.title: The Invisible Fight
programme.desc: In 1973 a young soldier survives an attack from a group of flying kung fu warriors. Hoping to follow in their footsteps, he travels to a local monastery to begin his martial-arts training.

programme.title: Moulin Rouge
programme.desc: A young Englishman in the Paris of 1899, becomes infatuated with Satine, a singer at the Moulin Rouge. However, she has been promised by the manager to a Duke in return for funding his next production. As the young lovers meet in secret, Satine's wedding day draws closer but she hides a fatal secret from both Christian and the Duke.
